common.siteDescription: Open-source Agent Operating System — an AI OS with 30 LLM providers, persistent 5-tier memory, 60+ tools, a full web UI, and layered Parallax security. Self-hosted, powered by Deno. Apache 2.0 licensed.

nav.gettingStartedDesc: Install and run your first agent

footer.newsletterDesc: Get updates on new releases, plugins, and features.

home.heroDescription: CortexPrism is an open-source, self-hosted Agent Operating System that turns any LLM into a capable autonomous agent. This AI OS features 30 LLM providers, persistent 5-tier memory, 60+ built-in tools, sandboxed code execution, a full-featured web UI, and enterprise-grade Parallax security — powered by Deno. Deploy your own Agent Operating System in one command.
home.featureSectionDesc: A comprehensive Agent Operating System toolset for building, deploying, and managing AI agents at any scale.
home.ctaDescription: Works on Linux, macOS, Windows, and WSL. Ships as a single Deno binary — no Docker required to get started.

features.interactiveChatDesc: Chat with 30 LLM providers including OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Groq, DeepSeek, and more.
features.toolUseDesc: Agents can use tools with configurable approval gates for safety.
features.memory5TierDesc: Episodic, semantic, reflection, graph, and skills tiers with hybrid FTS5 + vector retrieval.
features.parallaxSecurityDesc: Defense-in-depth with vault, policy engine, and approval workflows.
features.codeSandboxDesc: Secure code execution in sandboxed environments (Python, WASM, more).
features.modelRouterDesc: Cascade and threshold model routing for intelligent provider selection and failover.
features.daemonJobsDesc: Persistent daemon mode with scheduled jobs and background processing.
features.pluginSystemDesc: Extensible ESM/MCP/WASM plugin architecture with marketplace.
features.gitWorkspaceDesc: Full git porcelain with agent-powered commits, diffs, and branch management.
features.modelQuartermasterDesc: Adaptive 6-signal model selection engine with reinforcement learning.
features.workflowEngineDesc: DSL-based workflows with steps, branching, parallel execution, and approval gates.
features.cortexLensDesc: Immutable event log tracking every LLM call, tool execution, and policy decision.
features.selfLearningDesc: Auto-extracts reusable patterns from tool calls with 6-state lifecycle and trust tiering.
features.codeIntelligenceDesc: Tree-sitter WASM code graph across 14+ languages with call-graph traversal and impact analysis.
features.voicePipelineDesc: Speech-to-text, text-to-speech, energy-based VAD, and real-time audio streaming over WebSocket.
features.computerUseDesc: GUI automation via virtual displays with mouse, keyboard, and screenshot actions.
features.multiAgentOrchDesc: 6 orchestration strategies (sequential, parallel, debate, review-loop, hierarchical, graph DAG) for complex agent workflows.
features.swarmOrchestrationDesc: A2A-based distributed node clustering with coordinator, node registry, heartbeat monitoring, and resource snapshots.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

docs.browsePrompt: Browse the documentation using the sidebar. Select a topic to get started.
docs.knowledgeBaseDesc: Guides, best practices, troubleshooting, and reference materials for CortexPrism.

seo.defaultTitle: CortexPrism — Open-Source Agent Operating System | AI OS for Autonomous Agents
seo.defaultDescription: CortexPrism is the open-source Agent Operating System — an AI OS with 30 LLM providers, 5-tier memory, MCP plugin marketplace, sandboxed code execution, and enterprise-grade Parallax security. Self-host your autonomous AI agents. Apache 2.0 licensed.
